title: Stray Dogs!
description: They chase fast cars. They bite mailmen just to hear them squeal. They don’t go where they’re supposed to. They are stray dogs!
altHero: a bunch of tough looking mutts, one is wearing a bowler hat
alt2: two dogs doing some street gambling
alt3: a dog about to bite a mailman
alt4: a dog turning up its nose at a fire hydrant
